source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - Performance Marketing
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our Growth team. You'll work closely with the Growth team and play a key role in building high-impact playable ads by turning game mechanics into fast, engaging, and scalable interactive experiences.



At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.



Requirements

 - Experience with Unity and C# for mobile game development

 - Understanding of game mechanics and interactive experiences

 - Ability to build optimized, lightweight mobile content

 - Strong problem-solving skills with a creative and proactive mindset

 - Passion for mobile games and player-centric design

 - Collaborative team player with strong communication skills

 - Nice to have: Experience developing playable ads or working on performance marketing projects; familiarity with design tools



Responsibilities

 - Design, implement, and test interactive mechanics for playable ads

 - Build engaging, high-performing ad experiences for mobile campaigns

 - Iterate on playables to improve engagement and conversion

 - Optimize playables for performance, smoothness, and file size

 - Use A/B testing and data to improve ad performance

 - Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams throughout development

 - Stay up to date with trends and best practices in playable ads
   
   

Life at Agave

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

source_jobs.title: Product Specialist (New Grad)
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Product Specialist (New Grad) to join our Product team. You'll work closely with Product Managers, Artists, and Developers, and play a key role in supporting product decisions, improving game features, designing new levels, and contributing to the performance and player experience of our games.



At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction




REQUIREMENTS

 - New grad with a bachelor's degree (or in your final year)

 - Strong interest in mobile games and how they are built

 - An analytical mindset with curiosity for working with data

 - Sense of ownership, creativity, and attention to detail

 - Clear communication and problem-solving skills

 - Collaborative mindset and ability to work across teams

 - Eagerness to learn, iterate, and grow in a fast-paced environment
   
   


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Analyze player behavior and game metrics to identify improvement areas

 - Support the design and iteration of game features and mechanics

 - Conduct competitor and market research to generate insights

 - Assist in setting up and analyzing A/B tests

 - Collaborate with engineers, artists, and data team members

 - Contribute ideas to improve gameplay and player experience

 - Support product decisions with data and research
   
   


LIFE AT AGAVE

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer - AI
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our Technology team. You'll work closely with the Product, Growth, and Engineering teams to build AI-powered systems, developer tools, and intelligent workflows that power both our games and internal operations.



At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.



Requirements

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering, or an equivalent technical discipline

 - Experience building and shipping AI-powered products or workflows end-to-end, with a strong sense of ownership from ideation to deployment

 - Strong understanding of backend architectures, LLMs, AI agents, and modern software development practices

 - Strong product mindset with the ability to balance technical excellence and business impact

 - Ownership mentality with excellent collaboration and communication skills

 

Nice to Have:

 - Experience with AI agents, orchestration frameworks, RAG, vector databases, or AI developer tooling

 - Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or GCP



Responsibilities

 - Design, build, and maintain AI-powered systems for our games and internal tools

 - Develop scalable backend services leveraging LLMs, AI agents, and orchestration workflows

 - Rapidly prototype new ideas, validate them, and evolve them into production-ready solutions

 - Build AI-driven workflows for content generation, automation, developer productivity, and knowledge retrieval

 - Collaborate closely with Product, Engineering, Growth, and Art teams to solve real-world problems using AI

 - Own the performance, reliability, scalability, and observability of AI systems end-to-end

 - Stay up to date with emerging AI technologies and continuously evaluate new models, tools, and approaches



Life at Agave

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

source_jobs.title: Growth Specialist (New Grad)
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Growth Specialist (New Grad) to join our Growth team. You'll work closely with Product, Technology teams, Developers, and Motion Designers, and play a key role in supporting user acquisition efforts, analyzing performance, and helping scale our games to reach more players.



At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.




REQUIREMENTS

 - New grad with a bachelor's degree (or in your final year)

 - Strong interest in mobile games and growth marketing

 - Analytical mindset with curiosity for working with data

 - Creative thinking and willingness to experiment

 - Clear communication and collaborative attitude

 - Comfortable sharing ideas and insights with different teams

 - Eagerness to learn, iterate, and grow in a fast-paced environment




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Support the launch and monitoring of user acquisition campaigns (Meta, Google, TikTok etc.)

 - Contribute creative ideas for ads, messaging, and new channels

 - Analyze performance data to identify insights and trends

 - Assist with budget planning and predictive modeling inputs

 - Collaborate with product and game teams to align marketing with live ops and releases

 - Work with creatives to test and iterate on ad concepts

 - Stay up to date with trends in growth marketing and mobile gaming




LIFE AT AGAVE

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

source_jobs.title: Motion Designer, Performance Marketing (New Grad)
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a New Grad Motion Designer to join our Growth team. You'll work closely with the Growth team and play a key role in creating high-performing, engaging 2D motion creatives that reach and convert millions of players.

 

At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.




Requirements

 - Recent graduate or up to 1 year of experience in Motion Design, Graphic Design, Visual Communication Design, or a related field

 - A portfolio showcasing motion design projects (personal, academic, freelance, or professional)

 - Good knowledge of After Effects and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop & Illustrator)

 - Understanding of animation principles, timing, composition, and visual storytelling

 - Creative mindset with attention to detail and a willingness to learn

 - Interest in creating engaging 2D video ads and marketing creatives

 - Curious about AI image/video generation tools and excited to explore new creative technologies



Nice to have

 - Internship, freelance, or personal experience creating motion graphics

 - Interest in mobile games, advertising, or user acquisition creatives



Responsibilities

 - Design engaging 2D motion creatives and video ads for marketing campaigns

 - Support the Growth team in turning game mechanics into compelling ad concepts

 - Iterate on creatives based on feedback and performance insights

 - Collaborate with designers, marketers, and product teams throughout the creative process

 - Experiment with different visual styles, hooks, and formats

 - Stay up to date with trends in motion design, mobile advertising, and AI-powered creative tools

 - Continuously improve your craft by learning from feedback, teammates, and new technologies



Life at Agave

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

source_jobs.title: Game Developer
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for a Game Developer to join our Development team. You'll work closely with Product Managers and Artists, and play a key role in building and optimizing gameplay experiences that are fun, smooth, and engaging from the ground up.



At Agave Games, we create games that reach and inspire millions of players around the world. We’re a passionate, product-driven studio with a sharp focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.




REQUIREMENTS

 - Experience with C# and Unity game engine

 - Strong understanding of game mechanics and player experience

 - Passion for mobile games and player-centric design

 - Creative problem-solving mindset with a proactive approach

 - Ability to analyze games and translate insights into improvements

 - Team player who values collaboration and open feedback

 - Nice to have: experience developing or launching mobile games




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, implement, and test gameplay features

 - Develop high-quality, maintainable, and scalable game code

 - Collaborate closely with product, design, and engineering teams

 - Analyze gameplay and suggest improvements to enhance player experience

 - Contribute creative ideas to improve game mechanics and features

 - Optimize gameplay performance and ensure a smooth user experience

 - Stay up to date with trends and best practices in mobile game development



Life at Agave

 - Private health insurance

 - All-day meals and healthy snacks at the office, prepared by professional chefs

 - Free access to the on-site gym to support a healthy lifestyle

 - Relocation support is provided when needed

 - Continuous learning and professional development opportunities

 - Fun and inclusive team events and activities

 - Centrally located office in Istanbul with easy access to public transportation

notes: Agave Games is a product-driven game development studio with a strong focus on quality, creativity, and player satisfaction.
